verse_text: I will bring you into a land flowing with milk and honey; for I will not go up in your midst, lest I consume you on the way, for you are a stiff-necked people.'

pericope.title: God Orders Israel to Depart Sinai

links.context: [[EXO.33:3]], [[EXO.33:12]]-17: My Angel is the Son of the Father, and He sent Him to lead Israel to the promised land (GrgNy). "Angel" means "messenger," for the Son is the Will and Word of the Father (AthanG). He is the Angel who appeared to Moses in Exodus 3 and said, "I AM the Existing One" (3:2, 14). The Father also sent Him to become incarnate for the salvation of the world ([[1JN.4:14]]).
